name: Russian Lemon Soup- Liminnyi Sup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice and butter together in a medium saucepan with half a cup of chicken broth for 20-25 minutes.
2. Stir in the remaining chicken broth and bring to just the boiling point.
3. Add the cream, lemon rind, and lemon juice. Mix well.
4. Serve hot, garnished with parsley and a slice of lemon.
